title: goulardia canina
intro: Goulardia canina, also known as coltsfoot, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its yellow flowers and rounded leaves. The medicinal properties of Goulardia canina lie in its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and sore throats. The health benefits of consuming Goulardia canina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Goulardia canina can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
